final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for the 长安起源Q06 launch announcement (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a premium automotive reveal aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include main title centered or dominant, subtitle below or adjacent
Subject: must include the vehicle launch theme "长安起源Q06将于9月上市"
Scene/backdrop: needs a通透震撼 background treatment — exact background imagery is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, premium atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a brand-aligned direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06将于9月上市" (main title), subtitle text as appropriate
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve the vehicle model name 长安起源Q06 and launch timing 9月上市
Avoid:
